title: Craftable Saddle
description: Makes Saddles craftable (9/10 rideable mobs recommends)
body:
# Pisek's Craftable Saddle

After having trouble finding a saddle for my piggie "Česnek" ("Garlic" for you, English speakers), I got another great *(not true)* idea. In this data pack/mod, I added a crafting recipe for Saddles. Playing vanilla, the possibility to find a saddle is pretty tiny, with mods it's the opposite thanks to a lot of structures. This recipe could be harder - using Rabbit Hide instead of Leather but mostly the saddle is brown, not beige *(or whatever the colour)*.
